category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/NixOS/nixfmt describes nixfmt as the official formatter for Nix code.
source_facts.description says nixfmt formats Nix language code.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading and README use nixfmt/Nixfmt.
docs_sources: Official repository README says it is the user documentation.
Official repository includes standard.md for formatting standard documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/NixOS/nixfmt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository says nixfmt is the official formatter for Nix code.
